---
title: Block 3
---
```{r, echo = FALSE, results='asis'}
library(webexercises)
source("include/helper.R")
```

## Exercises

### Übungen 3 – A1
Bestimmen Sie die Ableitung zu

```{r exercise-3a1, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
question_with_single_choice(
	question = "(a) ${f}(x) = 3 x^{4} + x^{2} + 5$",
	choices = c(
		answer = "$f^{\\prime}(x) = 12x^{3} + 2x$",
		"$f^{\\prime}(x) = 12x^{3} + x$",
		"$f^{\\prime}(x) = 3x^{3} + 2x$"
	),
	solution = "(a) $\\f(x) =  3x^{4} + x^{2} + 5 \\Rightarrow f'(x) = 12x^{3} = 2x$"
)
```

```{r exercise-3a2, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
question_with_single_choice(
	question = "(b) ${f}(x) = e^{3x}$",
	choices = c(
		"$f^{\\prime}(x) = 2e^{3x}$",
		"$f^{\\prime}(x) = e^{3x}/3$",
		answer = "$f^{\\prime}(x) = 3e^{3x}$"
	),
	solution = "(b) $\\f(x) = e^{3x} \\Rightarrow f'(x) = 3e^{3x}$"
)
```

```{r exercise-3a3, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
question_with_single_choice(
	question = "(c) ${f}(x) = 2x + e^{3x} + x$",
	choices = c(
		"$f^{\\prime}(x) = e^{3x} + 2 + 1$",
		answer = "$f^{\\prime}(x) = 3e^{3x} + 3$",
		"$f^{\\prime}(x) = e^{3x} + 3$"
	),
	solution = "(c) $\\f(x) = 2x + e^{3x} + x \\Rightarrow f'(x) = 2 +3e^{3x} + 1 = 3e^{3x} + 3$"
)
```

```{r exercise-3a4, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
question_with_single_choice(
	question = "(d) ${f}(x) = \\sqrt{1 - x^{2}}$",
	choices = c(
		"$f^{\\prime}(x)  = 2 \\cdot (1 - x^{2} )^{-\\frac{1}{2}} \\cdot (-2x$",
		"$f^{\\prime}(x) = 1 - 2x$",
		answer = "$f^{\\prime}(x)  = 1/2 \\cdot (1 - x^{2} )^{-\\frac{1}{2}} \\cdot (-2x$"
	),
	solution = "(d) $\\f(x) = \\sqrt{1 - x^{2}} = (1 - x^{2})^{1/2} \\Rightarrow f'(x) = 1/2 \\cdot (1 - x^{2})^{- \\frac{1}{2}} \\cdot (-2x)$"
)
```

```{r exercise-3a5, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
question_with_single_choice(
	question = "(e) ${f}(x) = e^{x} \\cdot ln(x)$",
	choices = c(
		"$f^{\\prime}(x)$ = $e^{x}$ ($\\frac{1}{x} + \\ln(x))$",
		answer = "$f^{\\prime}(x)$  = $e^{x}$ $\\cdot$ $\\frac{1}{x}$ + $e^{x}$ $\\cdot \\ln(x)$",
		"$f^{\\prime}(x) = e^{x} \\cdot \\frac{1}{x}$"
	),
	solution = "(e) $\\f(x) = e^{x} \\cdot \\ln(x) \\Rightarrow f'(x) = e^{x} \\cdot \\frac{1}{x} + e^{x} \\cdot \\ln(x)$"
)
```

```{r exercise-3a6, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
question_with_single_choice(
	question = "(f) ${f}(x) =  \\frac{(x+4)}{x^{2}}$",
	choices = c(
		answer = "$f^{\\prime}(x) = (x + 4) \\cdot (-2) \\cdot \\frac{1}{x^{3}} + 1 \\cdot \\frac{1}{x^{2}}$",
		"$f^{\\prime}(x) = (x + 4) \\cdot \\frac{1}{x^{3}} + 1 \\cdot \\frac{1}{x^{2}}$",
		"$f^{\\prime}(x) = \\frac{1}{x^{2}} + 1 \\cdot \\frac{1}{x^{3}}$"
	),
	solution = "(f) $\\f(x) = \\frac{ (x + 4) }{x^{2}} = (x + 4) \\cdot \\frac{1}{x^{2}} \\Rightarrow f'(x) = (x + 4) \\cdot (-2) \\cdot \\frac{1}{x^{3}} + 1 \\cdot \\frac{1}{x^{2}}$"
)
```

```{r exercise-3a7, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
question_with_single_choice(
	question = "(g) ${f}(x) = (x + 4) \\cdot e^{x}$",
	choices = c(
		"$f^{\\prime}(x) = (x + 4) \\cdot e^{x}$",
		"$f^{\\prime}(x) = 1 + e^{x}$",
		answer = "$f^{\\prime}(x) = (x + 4) \\cdot e^{x} + 1 \\cdot e^{x}$"
	),
	solution = "(g) $\\f(x) = (x + 4) \\cdot e^{x} \\Rightarrow f'(x) = (x + 4) \\cdot e^{x} + 1 \\cdot e^{x}$"
)
```

```{r exercise-3a8, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
question_with_single_choice(
	question = "(h) ${f}(x) = ln(x - 4) + 2$",
	choices = c(
		answer = "$f^{\\prime}(x) = 1/(x - 4)$",
		"$f^{\\prime}(x) = x - 4$",
		"$f^{\\prime}(x) = \\frac{1}{x^{x}} + 2$"
	),
	solution = "(h) $\\f(x) = \\ln(x - 4) + 2 \\Rightarrow f'(x) = 1/(x - 4)$"
)
```

```{r exercise-3a9, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
question_with_single_choice(
	question = "(i) ${f}(x) = e^{-2x}$",
	choices = c(
		"$f^{\\prime}(x) = e^{-2x}$",
		answer = "$f^{\\prime}(x) = -2e^{-2x}$",
		"$f^{\\prime}(x) = 2e^{-2x}$"
	),
	solution = "(i) $\\f(x) = e^{-2x} \\Rightarrow f'(x) = -2e^{-2x}$"
)
```

```{r exercise-3a10, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
question_with_single_choice(
	question = "(j) ${f}(x) = e^{-2x^{2}}$",
	choices = c(
		answer = "$f^{\\prime}(x) = -4x \\cdot e^{-2x^{2}}$",
		"$f^{\\prime}(x) = e^{-2x^{2}}$",
		"$f^{\\prime}(x) = -2x \\cdot e^{-2x^{2}}$"
	),
	solution = "(j) $\\f(x) = e^{-2x} \\Rightarrow f'(x) = -4x \\cdot e^{-2x^{2}}$"
)
```

### Übungen 3 – A2
Gegeben ist die Funktion ${f}(x) = 8 x^{3} + 3 x^{2} – 3x$.
<br><br> Verwenden Sie folgende Regel:<br>
Nullstellen einer quadratischen Funktion $f(x) = ax^{2} + bx + c$ gegeben
durch: $x_{1,2} = \\frac{-b \\pm \\sqrt{b^{2} - 4ac}}{2a}$ <br><br>

```{r exercise-3a11, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
question_with_single_choice(
	question = "(a) Bestimmen Sie die erste Ableitung der Funktion ${f}(x) = 8 x^{3} + 3 x^{2} – 3x$.",
	choices = c(
		answer = "$f^{\\prime}(x) = 24x^{2} + 6x - 3$",
		"$f^{\\prime}(x)= 16x^{2} + 6x - 3$",
		"$f^{\\prime}(x)= 24x^{2} + 6x + 3$"
	),
	solution = "(j) $\\f(x) = e^{-2x} \\Rightarrow f'(x) = -4x \\cdot e^{-2x^{2}}$"
)

question_with_multi_fitb(
	question = "Bestimmen Sie anschließend die Nullstellen:",
	fields = list(
		list(prefix = "$x_{1} =$", answer = -0.5),
		list(prefix = "$x_{2} =$", answer = 0.25)
	)
)
```

```{r exercise-3a12, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
question_with_multi_fitb(
	question = "(b) Bestimmen Sie die globalen und lokalen Extremstellen der Funktion im Intervall $[-1,1]$. Skizzieren Sie die Funktion zunächst auf dem Intervall $[-1,1]$.",
	fields = list(
		list(prefix = "$f(-1) =$", answer = -2),
		list(prefix = "$f(x1) =$", answer = 1.25),
		list(prefix = "$f(x2) =$", answer = -0.4375),
		list(prefix = "$f(1) =$", answer = 8)
	)
)
```

::: {.callout-tip collapse="true" title="Lösung"}
Zunächst muss die Ableitung gebildet werden.<br>
Es ist $\\f'(x) = 24x^{2} + 6x -3$ <br>

Davon müssen nun die Nullstellen bestimmt werden: <br><br>
$\\0 = 24x^{2} + 6x - 3 \\Leftrightarrow 0 = 8x^{2} + 2x -1$ <br><br>
$\\ \\Leftrightarrow x_{1,2} = \\frac{-2 \\pm \\sqrt{4 - 4 \\cdot 8 \\cdot (-1)}}{16} = \\frac{-2 \\pm \\sqrt{36}}{16} \\Rightarrow x_{1} = - 0.5,x_{2} = 0.25$

<img src="images/image_3A2.png" width="300">

Eine Auswertung der Funktion an den möglichen Extremstellen, sowie am
Rand des Intervalls ergibt: <br>
$\\f(-1) = -2, f(-0.5) = 1.25, f(0.25) = -0.4375, f(1) = 8$ <br><br>
Daraus lässt sich ablesen, dass die absoluten Extremwerte am Rand
liegen. Da ein Polynom vom Grad 3 entweder zwei Extremwerte oder eine
Wendestelle besitzt, sind die inneren Punkte auch lokale Extremwerte.
:::
